description_long: This object is a pair of over-ear headphones, specifically the Bose brand, featuring a padded headband and large cushioned ear cups designed for comfort during extended use. The ear cups are oval-shaped and appear to be made of synthetic leather or foam padding, providing both noise isolation and a soft fit around the ears. The headband is covered in a fabric or soft-touch material, likely with internal metal reinforcement for durability and adjustability. The headphones have a sleek, matte black finish with subtle blue accents visible along the ear cup edges. The Bose logo is prominently displayed on the outer side of each ear cup, indicating a focus on both style and brand recognition. The overall construction suggests a lightweight yet robust design, suitable for portable, everyday use in urban environments.
description: A pair of Bose over-ear headphones with cushioned ear cups, a padded headband, and a matte black finish with blue accents.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Bose logo on the left ear cup and the padded headband.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the oval-shaped, cushioned ear cups and the headband's curvature.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the Bose logo on the right ear cup and the overall symmetry of the headphones.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view focusing on the inner padding of the ear cups and the headband's underside.
